items.name: Protein Cube (Sad Flavor)
items.flavor: Tastes like someone gave up halfway through making it.

items.name: Protein Cube (Spicy Regret)
items.flavor: The spice level is labeled 'Why?'.

items.name: Protein Cube (Uncertainty Flavor)
items.flavor: You can't tell if it's sweet or savory. It can't either.

items.name: Protein Cube (Double Chocolate)
items.flavor: Surprisingly good. Suspiciously good.

items.name: Protein Cube (Forbidden Recipe)
items.flavor: The label says: 'Do not consume. Ever.'

items.name: Bravado Battery Energy Drink (REDACTED)
items.flavor: Label says: 'Do not consume before, during, or after combat.'

items.name: Bravado Battery Energy Drink (Blue Lightning)
items.flavor: Tastes like electricity and poor decisions.

items.name: Bravado Battery Energy Drink (Green Mystery)
items.flavor: The flavor is listed as 'Yes.'

items.name: Bravado Battery Energy Drink (Ultra Overdrive)
items.flavor: You can feel your teeth vibrating.

items.name: Bravado Battery Energy Drink (Black Label)
items.flavor: The can is warm. The drink is cold. Physics is confused.

items.name: MRE: Spicy Regret
items.flavor: The spice level is labeled 'Why?'.

items.name: MRE: Cold Pasta
items.flavor: The noodles crunch. They shouldn't.

items.name: MRE: Mystery Meat
items.flavor: The meat is a mystery. The mystery is also a mystery.

items.name: MRE: Deluxe Edition
items.flavor: Comes with a tiny dessert that tastes like hope.

items.name: MRE: Chef's Final Masterpiece
items.flavor: The packaging whispers your name.

items.name: Half-Eaten Energy Bar
items.flavor: Someone took one bite and gave up.

items.name: Energy Bar (Crunchy)
items.flavor: Crunchy in a way that suggests structural failure.

items.name: Energy Bar (Soggy)
items.flavor: You don't want to know why it's wet.

items.name: Energy Bar (Ultra Boost)
items.flavor: You feel faster just looking at it.

items.name: Energy Bar (Cosmic Flavor)
items.flavor: Tastes like starlight and existential dread.

items.name: Water Bottle (Classic)
items.flavor: Warm. Slightly dented. Perfect.

items.name: Water Bottle (Fancy Label)
items.flavor: Has a logo for a company that no longer exists. Collectible.

items.name: Water Bottle (Half-Empty)
items.flavor: Someone left this. It's not your fault they're gone.

items.name: Tactical Water Bottle
items.flavor: Has MOLLE attachments. Holds water AND attitude.

items.name: Water Bottle (Mystery Fluid)
items.flavor: Moon water. Made with real cranks.

items.name: Expired Medpatch
items.flavor: Technically still adhesive. Questionably still medicine.

items.name: Medpatch (Standard)
items.flavor: Fixes wounds and your attitude.

items.name: Medpatch (Advanced)
items.flavor: Heals faster than you can complain.

items.name: Medpatch (Nanite Swarm)
items.flavor: The nanites whisper encouragement.

items.name: Canned Beans (Classic)
items.flavor: A timeless classic. Smells like survival.

items.name: Canned Beans (Spicy)
items.flavor: The spice hits immediately. And then again later.

items.name: Canned Beans (Deluxe)
items.flavor: Comes with a tiny garnish. Fancy.

items.name: Canned Beans (Mythic Batch)
items.flavor: The can glows faintly. You feel chosen.

items.name: Mysterious Tea Bag
items.flavor: Smells like herbs and unresolved trauma.

items.name: Nearly Fresh Special Tea Bag
items.flavor: The tag reads: 'Steep for 3 minutes. Fear for 5.'

items.name: Tea Bag (Eternal Brew)
items.flavor: The tea tastes like memories you never had.

items.name: Generic Snack Mix
items.flavor: Mostly crumbs. Still edible.

items.name: Deluxe Snack Mix
items.flavor: Contains at least one whole pretzel.

items.name: Snack Mix (Chaos Blend)
items.flavor: Every handful is a new experience. Not all good.

items.name: Mystery Soup Can
items.flavor: The label is blank. The soup is not.

items.name: Deluxe Soup Can
items.flavor: Contains vegetables that look almost fresh.

items.name: Soup Can (Prime Batch)
items.flavor: The broth whispers ancient secrets.

items.name: Nearly Fresh Bar (Legal Gray)
items.flavor: Freshness pending review by someone brave.

items.name: Snack Shrine Trial Mix
items.flavor: Left as an offering. Taken as a strategy.
